arts.ttl: Carney Chukwuemeka joins Borussia Dortmund on loan from Chelsea: Details of deal revealed including buy option
arts.sum: Chelsea midfielder Carney Chukwuemeka joins Bundesliga giants Borussia Dortmund on loan for the remainder of the 2024-25 season.

arts.ttl: Video: Joao Felix arrives for Milan deadline day transfer from Chelsea
arts.sum: Watch as Joao Felix has arrived on Italian soil for a last-minute deadline day transfer...

arts.ttl: Chelsea star joins Borussia Dortmund on loan - with option to buy HIGHER than his £40m release clause
arts.sum: Chelsea have confirmed the departure of midfielder Carney Chukwuemeka to Borussia Dortmund on loan deal. The deal includes a buy option higher than his £40m release clause.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa transfer latest: 'Agreement' for Chelsea defender Axel Disasi on deadline day amidst Tottenham Hotspur interest
arts.sum: Aston Villa reach an agreement to take Chelsea centre-back Axel Disasi on loan for the rest of the season, pipping Tottenham Hotspur to his signature.

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace fans have a lot to say about Chelsea’s Ben Chilwell ahead of loan move, ‘not what we thought’…
arts.sum: Chelsea’s Ben Chilwell is rumoured to be on his way to Crystal Palace on Monday’s transfer deadline day. Ben Chilwell, 28, has been on the...

arts.ttl: Alejandro Garnacho drops Chelsea transfer bombshell with five-word Man United statement
arts.sum: Alejandro Garnacho has appeared to end any speculation over a move to Chelsea from Manchester United before Monday night's transfer deadline. And Garnacho also appears to have hinted that he won't be making the move to Stamford Bridge before Monday's 11pm deadline.

arts.ttl: Bowen pounces on Colwill error to put Hammers ahead!
arts.sum: Jarrod Bowen gives West Ham the lead after taking advantage of a Levi Colwill mistake!

arts.ttl: Aston Villa set to sign Chelsea centre-back Axel Disasi on loan
arts.sum: Aston Villa have reached an agreement with Premier League rivals Chelsea over a loan move for France international centre-back Axel Disasi (26), according to The Telegraph’s Matt Law. Villa were…

arts.ttl: What Chelsea plan to do with new signing Mathis Amougou after Strasbourg loan suggestions - journalist
LIVE: Chelsea drop goalkeeper Sanchez for visit of West Ham
arts.sum: Chelsea look to boost their push for the Champions League places against West Ham. ESPN has updates
